author: Jdub
content:
+$57K on the month so far 

Only taken 4 trades total 

Just goes to show what can happen when the right opportunities present themselves with the right market context 

Every trade I've taken for the past 2 years has been documented live in real time in front of hundreds of students 

Through the pre-market preps, lives sessions, and weekly recaps you guys see everything the good and the bad

Currently I'm on pace to have my biggest month yet (hopefully I don't jinx this ahaha)

What I trying to say is that I'm truly grateful for this community. I spend so much time here everyday, you guys are all family even though I haven't seen most of your faces

I'm not crying like I did that one live session (I'm curious to see who remembers that😂 )

On a more serious note I appreciate all you guys 

I hope you find the value in this program that Tony, I and the rest of the team provide everyday!

Let's keeping crushing it!

@everyone

author: Jdub
content:
**🚨 BLACK FRIDAY SALE — Ending Soon 🚨**


The final sale of the year is coming to an end soon!

I just wanted to take a moment to reflect on what this past year has meant. When we launched the accelerator, I genuinely didn’t know what to expect. It was my first time live trading in front of so many people, every day, with full transparency.

I put a lot of pressure on myself not just to perform, but to show up consistently, execute well, and be someone you could learn from in real time.

After daily live sessions, premarket prep, weekly breakdowns and trade reviews, I can confidently say I’ve grown massively as a trader, not just in P&L, but in execution, discipline, and psychology.

And more importantly, many of you have grown along with me.

I personally had my biggest month ever making over $100K in profits. I'm super grateful to be able to say this. 

But what's even better is seeing many of you have your biggest months trading in November!

Seeing members refine their edge, elevate their confidence, and mature as traders has been the best part of this entire journey. The community we’ve built here is something special.

We have big plans for 2026 and want to make sure you can learn and grow with us!

Now is the perfect time to secure your spot and grow with us.

content:
Gameplan Janaury 26th 

Coming into this week we have a bunch of red folder news with the fed speaking and of course earnings week. Coming into today we had a gap down with news over the weekend but now we are back at the last weeks close. 

What I would like to see coming into market open is the reaction that we have off the 620.5 on the QQQ and the 688.5 on the SPY. Overall markets still holding up very nicely. 

As for the main watches coming into today the names that have the best moves are MSFT, AMZN, & META. These ones had a nice push on Friday. Most of them have earnings this week. 

We can look for continuation on these names Monday and Tuesday. 

As for the SEMIs I would be a bit cautious. Seems like they are losing a bit of steam. Most of the names are at ATHs. We need to see some sort of pullback or seutp to form in order to take AMD, NVDA, MU, SNDK.

author: MambaTrades
content:
Premarket Gameplan

Market  Analysis:
Indices are showing relative weakness due to tariff news. I am watching NQ for acceptance below 20336.50 for continuation lower. If we hold that level that and trend above the opening print, we could see a relief bounce. ES we have some level between 5808.25 and 5803.50. Watching for acceptance below those level or bounce for longs. Today can be a tricky day after ES dropped about 5% the last 8 trading days. 

Wait patiently until price gives you an entry signal. Sometimes the best trades are no trades. 

ES Volume: 384k - great volume in the premarket (usually want 150k minimum)

Any News today?
No news until trump speaks @9pm

Watchlist:
NQ acceptance under 20339.25; PT 20219, 20150
bounce @20339 that trends above the opening print for longs (relief bounce)

ES acceptance under 5803.50 PT 5751.50
ES bounce @ 5808.25-5803.5 that trend above opening print for longs

@everyone

author: MambaTrades
content:
Premarket Gameplan

Market  Analysis:
The market is flat after NFP news with NQ up .24% and ES up .09%. We are inside yesterday range and Powell is speaking @ the open. This is a good day to take off with Powell and Trump speaking today. The combination of NQ and ES being stuck between 2 levels + Powell & Trump speaking later is a recipe for range and volatility. Be safe today is risk off. 

ES Volume: 292k

Any News?
NFP @830
Powell @930
Trump @12

Watchlist:

NQ acceptance under 20027 for shorts. PT 19890
-Bounce @ 20027 or trend above OP or longs. PT Overnight highs 20271
 
ES acceptance under 5724.75 PT 5695
-Bounce @ 5724.75 or trend above the OP for longs. Target 5786

Today could definitely be a range day so you can play the range like this.
-Wait 30 mins @open
-Short the top of the range
-Long the bottom of the range

content: Prime example of stepping away is key. If I stayed at the desk, I could have taken dumb trades, went on tilt, gave back all my weekly profits. Dont stay at the blackjack table, leave the casino when you’re up on the week. @here

author: MambaTrades
content:
Small loss on the day. Been in a mini funk past 3 trading days. Setups were good but not optimal. I know over time the playbook setups print so reminding myself to think long term and play the probabilities. The law of averages will ultimately work itself out.

If you’re in a funk too, zoom out and remind yourself there’s 252 trading days. A few days don’t define you as a trader. Remain discipline and follow your plan regardless of outcome.

author: MambaTrades
content:
One of my biggest issues the past 2-3 weeks of trading was being married to my daily bias and not being adaptive to change in price action and volume. 

For example, we've had a lot of gap downs and gap fills up and I kept trying to short the move up because I was married with the higher timeframe bias/narrative. Not good for this current market conditions with all the news, tariffs, and dip buyers. 

Moral of the story is be flexible and be willing to adapt your bias if price tells you a different story. 

Have a great trading day @here
